---
title: "Webinars"
page-layout: custom
title-block-style: none
toc: false
subtitle: "Browse all our webinars"
description: "Browse and register for free online webinars on cybersecurity, cloud, AI, development, and business topics from chen.ist Academy."
listing:
  contents: "pages/*.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [image, date, title, subtitle, presenter, category]
  date-format: "MMMM D, YYYY"
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <style>.m { --c: #F5A623; }</style>
---

```{=html}
<div class="m">

<div class="m-hero">
  <div class="container">
    <h1>Academy <span class="gr">Webinars</span></h1>
    <p>Browse all our webinars</p>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="text-center mb-4">
      <img src="/assets/svg/presentation.svg" alt="Webinars" style="max-width: 150px; margin-bottom: 20px;">
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```

Welcome to our webinars listing page. Here you can browse all upcoming and past webinars hosted by chen.ist. Use the filters to find webinars by category, date, or presenter.

## Cyber Awareness (September 20, 2025)

Learn how to strengthen your organization's human layer of defense with new-school security awareness and compliance training. This webinar focuses on building a security culture that reduces human risk.

**Hosts:** Alin Mechenici, CEO @ Chenist Cybersecurity & Aneta Kozakiewicz, Channel Account Manager @ KnowBe4

[Learn more about this webinar -->](/academy/webinars/pages/cyber-awareness.html)

```{=html}
<div class="m">
<div class="m-s">
  <div class="container">
    <div class="alert alert-success mt-4 mb-4" role="alert">
      <h4 class="alert-heading"><i class="bi bi-megaphone"></i> New Webinar Added!</h4>
      <p>Check out our <a href="pages/cyber-awareness.html" class="alert-link">Cyber Awareness</a> webinar on September 20, 2025 - learn how to strengthen your organization's human layer of defense with new-school security awareness training.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</div>
```

## Webinar Categories

- **Cybersecurity**: Protect your organization with the latest security strategies
- **Cloud Computing**: Optimize your cloud infrastructure and services
- **AI & ML**: Explore artificial intelligence and machine learning technologies
- **Development**: Improve your coding skills and software engineering practices
- **Business**: Align technology with business objectives and strategies

Our webinars are designed to provide practical knowledge and expert insights in convenient online sessions. Each webinar page provides detailed information about the content, presenters, duration, and registration process.

Want to suggest a webinar topic or present as a guest speaker? [Contact us](https://cal.com/chenist) with your ideas.
